programme.title: E1 - Let's Bake A Meal
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and Chef Antonia Lofaso welcome actor Cheech Marin, host Maria Menounos and comic Billy Gardell to the Flavortown Lounge for an epic night of games and food!

programme.title: E1 - Modern Comfort Food: Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ina Garten is all about comforting weeknight dinners, starting with all-in-one Skillet-Roasted Chicken and Potatoes.

programme.title: E2 - Modern Comfort Food: Simple Pleasures
programme.desc: It's all about simple pleasures and four dishes that bring Ina Garten pure joy.She makes Smashed Hamburgers with Caramelized Onions and Cheddar.

programme.title: E2 - Coolhaus
programme.desc: The quest to push ice cream flavors to the limit takes Rhett and Link to Coolhaus, where they taste adventurous creations while blindfolded.

programme.title: E3 - Grapes
programme.desc: Award-winning chef and restaurateur Katie Button explores the stories and uses behind different delicious ingredients and shares her knowledge of cooking techniques.

programme.title: E1 - Philly Food Fight
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Ali snacks on cheesesteak- and apple pie-filled dumplings.

programme.title: E2 - A Buzz In Brooklyn
programme.desc: Ali heads to Brooklyn and snacks on a borough classic: a fried eggplant parm sandwich.

programme.title: E2 - Crosstown Double Cross

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: E3 - Jungle River
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: E3 - Jungle River
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Today's Cooking Special Edition: Tassin Shima's Small Journey
programme.desc: In the autumn of 2025, 150 years after apples were first planted in Aomori, Shima visits Hirosaki for the first time during the apple harvest season. Meeting women apple growers and a craftsman who makes traditional bamboo harvesting baskets, she explores the people and traditions behind Aomori's apple culture. Be sure to enjoy Shima's apple‑filled sweets and everyday dishes, made with her signature love for apples.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Halftime Report

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: E38 - In Uzes (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the national stud farm of Uzes and in the black truffle.

programme.title: E1 - The Music Of Transmission/Freshwater Surfer
programme.desc: Nature, tradition and rock'n'roll, for the Bonvins it's a family story. Paul and his children form a group: Paul Mac Bonvin & The Bullfrogs. Steeve Fleury is stand-up paddle champion and artist. Whether riding them or drawing them, waves and water are his passions.

programme.title: E3 - Passing On
programme.desc: Paquet House is supporting two families with their restoration adventures. Elisa Gouin has inherited a family passion for her ancestral home. And a traditional builder passes on his know-how to his son.

programme.title: E38 - In Uzes (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the national stud farm of Uzes and in the black truffle.

programme.title: E103
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E39 - In Uzes (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in flamenco and in Uzes brandade.

programme.title: E14 - Rare Knowhow In Normandy
programme.desc: At the Ateliers Saint-Cyr, in Normandy, art craftsmen innovate in weaving, bookbinding, and filography, showcasing a rare local expertise. Also, the story of the Tank watch by Cartier, created in 1917 and inspired by the tanks of the First World War.

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E19 - Rainbow's Niece
programme.desc: Sarah's new colour wheel reminds Rainbow that he has not seen his niece in a while.

programme.title: E32 - Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout 'DING DONG' when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: E42 - It's Time To Bake Gingerbread Pandas
programme.desc: It's snowing outside, but JoJo and Gran Gran are cosy in the kitchen making gingerbread biscuits. JoJo knows exactly what shape to make. There's plenty of help from Ned, Monty and Jared too.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: E9 - Leek
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing 'Can't Hold Me Down'.

programme.title: E2 - Gloves
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different types of gloves - green gloves, woolly gloves, fingerless gloves and glowing gloves!

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E16 - The Big Sleepover
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: E32 - Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout 'DING DONG' when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: E43 - It's Time For Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

E8 - Even More Shorts
programme.desc: Weird Man apprehends a dangerous foreign criminal, Belly Bag discovers a cat stuck in the RV tree, and Uncle Grandpa hosts a space exploration program on this new collection of shorts.

programme.title: E5 - Monster Babies
programme.desc: Alice lures Oscar and his monster friends for a tea party, but only to turn the monsters into cute babies.

programme.title: E6 - Hedgehog Werewolf
programme.desc: Hedgehog gets bit by a cute puppy and is starting to act strange.

programme.title: E25 - Hide And Seek Chameleon
programme.desc: Casey Chameleon joins Elmo, Gabrielle, and Grover’s game of hide and seek.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Fired from the Anti-Villain League, Gru finds himself in a major identity crisis until the appearance of a mysterious stranger reminds him how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E7 - Aboriginal Voices
programme.desc: Leaders and representatives of Aboriginal communities show Zac and Darin how Indigenous cultures live to protect and preserve the land.

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E39 - Let's Play With The Sisters
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: E1 - French Guiana: The Touloulous Of Cayenne
programme.desc: Each carnival season in French Guiana sees the return of the mysterious touloulous, haunting the masked balls in search of a dance partner. A tradition with unique and very strict rules. But carnival also means music, and the band Les Mecenes has been setting the tempo for forty years.

programme.title: E24 - Wilderness
programme.desc: The body of a ranger is found deep in a nature reserve closed to visitors. He lived alone, isolated on the shores of a mountain lake. And so begins a particularly strange investigation: very few people, all scientists, were to be found in this lonely spot, cut-off from the world.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Making Change Green, Fair And Clean
programme.desc: Retrofitting conventional vehicles could help Delhi go electric more equitably. Also: women farmers battle age-old structures - and making power from bird poop.

programme.title: My Five-Year Plan - Chinese Women Between Ambition And Tradition
programme.desc: Three young women from China are struggling to realize their dreams. While Chinese society is undergoing profound change, they are simultaneously feeling the social pressure to start a family and have children.

programme.title: Of Rhinos And Men
programme.desc: A win for wildlife, a loss for humans. African nature reserves are restricting indigenous peoples' access to rivers and forests - and, in doing so, are endangering their very existence.

programme.title: The Last Pole-And-Line Fishermen Of The Azores
programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.title: Why Japan Is Rearming
programme.desc: Japan is shifting from passive defense to active deterrence vis a vis China over Taiwan. It's a gamble to assert itself in the Indo-Pacific and to reshape its relationship with the US, its longtime security guarantor.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Love is Love
programme.desc: Shek Kam Shui eloped to the city with his lover Ng Dai Tai. He becomes a diamond sales and was appraised by his senior, Nancy which finally destroys his marriage...

programme.title: Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan tracks and befriends a vast herd of wild horses in Canada.

programme.title: Amanpour: Tuesday, April 21, 2026 1Pm ET
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Connect The World (45M): Wednesday, April 22, 2026 9Am ET
programme.desc: Becky Anderson explores diverse perspectives and explains global issues of the day.

programme.title: World Sport (30M): Wednesday, April 22, 2026 530Pm ET
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: Laura Coates Live: Wednesday, April 22, 2026 11Pm
programme.desc: Laura Coates goes inside the story with a relentless pursuit of the facts.

programme.title: The Story Is With Elex Michaelson: Thursday, April 23, 2026 12Am ET
programme.desc: Elex Michaelson tackles the breaking stories making headlines with sharp analysis, fresh perspective, and a dose of humor.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Sheepdog
programme.desc: Henry meets a Border Collie sheep dog and learns what a sheep dog does and why shepherds use them.

programme.title: Chicken Chase
programme.desc: The Kemii finally collect a critical mass of the cloning molecule Multiplonium. But Goliath's chicken gobbles it all up, mistaking it for corn, then goes on the run and clones into 2, then 4, 8, 16 - complicating Teresa's plans to catch it.

programme.title: Bianca Ciocirlan: Hoverboard Performer
programme.desc: Young hoverboard artist Bianca Ciocirlan shares how she became the best in the world, achieving forty-five pirouettes on a hoverboard in thirty seconds. Bianca is also a professional hoverboard performer and former figure skater.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: The Need for Speed
programme.desc: All eyes are on speed skater Izzy who has one last chance to prove she has got what it takes to represent Team Great Britain at the Olympics. And ice dancer Ella swaps her ice skates for pedals at the velodrome.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Skateboard Showdown
programme.desc: Fico is eager to prove to his cousin Rico that he's the better skateboarder. So they all head to a skate park in Shanghai, China, to enter a big competition! But they discover that it's a team event. Is it really so important to be the best?

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, safety's a little shaky. So is justice! It's ‘Sheriff' Howler's job to hunt down outlaws and bring them before the judge. But the methods he uses are a trifle different from what we're used to today!

programme.title: Skateboard Showdown
programme.desc: Fico is eager to prove to his cousin Rico that he's the better skateboarder. So they all head to a skate park in Shanghai, China, to enter a big competition! But they discover that it's a team event. Is it really so important to be the best?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....an Arcade Machine
programme.desc: Henry meets an old retro arcade machine in a seaside arcade. Players are in short supply as no-one wants to play an old retro arcade game.

programme.title: Babysitting Goliath
programme.desc: When Max is left alone with Goliath and their babysitter, Teresa gives him three simple rules: don't let Goliath hear organ music, smell 'chicken smoke,' or see the full moon through food, or there'll be terrible consequences.

programme.title: Make or Break
programme.desc: It's a busy week for our Ice Stars. Charlie and Freddie have tryouts for a different sort of ice sport. Meanwhile, the Icicles are taking a break from their busy schedule and having some fun off the ice. And Asiyah is waiting for an important call.

programme.title: The Journey from Mouth to Stomach
programme.desc: The doctors demonstrate how the mouth, nose and stomach are all connected. Dr. Xand visits a freezing room and Dr. Chris meets a robot surgeon. In the emergency room at the hospital, one patient has a stone in his ear and another has a broken elbow.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team
programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.desc: Jamie cooks a trusty midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisu.

programme.title: E1 - Maldives
programme.desc: In this episode, we get special access to Gili Lankanfushi resort in the Maldives, the ultimate romantic getaway and one of the most exclusive hotels in the world, where stays cost as much as £25000 per night.

programme.title: E1 - Maldives
programme.desc: In this episode, we get special access to Gili Lankanfushi resort in the Maldives, the ultimate romantic getaway and one of the most exclusive hotels in the world, where stays cost as much as £25000 per night.

programme.title: E121 - The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: E623 - Pups Rescue A Rescuer / Pups Save The Phantom Of The Frog Pond
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny, but the pups end up having to rescue the rescuer, too! // A spooky sound forces frogs from their home. The pups must bring them home and solve the mystery of the frog pond phantom

programme.title: E626 - Pups Save A Tour Bus / Pups Save Midnight At The Museum
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the mini-patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: E827 - Valentine's Day
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Daddy Pig gives Mummy Pig a card but Where's Daddy Pig's card from Mummy? Mummy Pig had put it in the post, but it hasn't arrived yet. Will Daddy Pig get a card?

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E842 - Fire Station Practice
programme.desc: Today is the fire station practise day. Mummy Pig joins with the other mummies to practise fighting fires. The fire brigade demonstrate their practice using their motto: Ready, Steady, Go!

programme.title: E102 - Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E109 - Pups Save The Treats / Pups Get A Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day! // Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E107 - The Crew Builds A Beaver Home / The Crew Fixes A Road
programme.desc: The power is out in Builder Cove! When the pups find out a beaver is to blame, they've got to build him a new home to bring the power back. // When Speed Meister damages the road ahead of the town helper parade, the pups work fast to repave the way.

programme.title: E508 - International Day
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends at playgroup dress up in clothes from different countries all over the world, but then have an argument.

programme.title: E504 - Horsey Twinkle Toes
programme.desc: There is much excitement when Mr Zebra delivers a package from Aunt Dottie for Peppa and George.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E831 - Mr Potato's Fruit & Vegetable Quiz
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at school where they have a special guest, Mr Potato! Mr Potato is there to host a special quiz for the children about fruit and vegetables.

programme.title: E833 - Made Up Musical Instruments
programme.desc: Today at playgroup Peppa and her friends make their own instruments from bits and bobs of old packaging.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - Namastey London
programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.title: Naya Raasta
programme.desc: Chander, a criminal lawyer, gives up his successful career and returns to his ancestral village. There, he comes face-to-face with social problems such as casteism, untouchability and poverty.

programme.title: E1 - Extraa Shots Kabir Singh
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Ajanabee
programme.desc: Middle-classed Rohit (Rajesh Khanna) falls in love with rich Reshmi (Zeenat Aman) and marries her. But fate has other plans and he gets arrested for the murder which he never committed.

programme.desc: A young woman faces an unwanted pregnancy at a time when abortion is still banned.

programme.title: Aaja Nachle
programme.desc: Dia returns home to find her beloved dance theatre facing demolition. Determined to save it, she inspires the indifferent townspeople to join a dance performance and fight for its survival. Release Year: 2007 Director: Anil Mehta Awards: IIFA Award: Best Choreography: Vaibhavi Merchant

programme.title: All's Well End's Well 2020
programme.desc: The Yau's brothers are a trio of scammers who make punishing baddies their mission. A misunderstanding leads them to fellow con artists the Lui's sisters, and they join hands to scam a notorious mob boss. Through a myriad of ingenious tricks and disguises, they bring the mobster to justice as romance blossoms swiftly...

programme.title: A Beautiful Life
programme.desc: When they first meet, no one can see this coming. She is a young, aggressive Beijing-based real estate agent from Hong Kong carrying an affair with a married man who also happens to be her boss. He is an honest but way too rigid policeman in his midlife crisis, who remains single to take care of his kid brother. A chance encounter in a karaoke lounge leads to an unlikely friendship. While he becomes infatuated with her, finding her pronunciation of his name the most dulcet tune he has ever heard, she is wrestling with being dumped by her boss and fired from her job at the same time. She eventually runs off to Hong Kong after borrowing almost his entire savings...
